nasb.text: Then Manoah said to the angel of the Lord, “Please let us detain you so that we may prepare a young goat for you.”

esv.text: Manoah said to the angel of the Lord, “Please let us detain you and prepare a young goat for you.”

cnv.text: 瑪挪亞對耶和華的使者說：“請留下，好讓我為你預備一隻山羊羔。”

ccb.text: 玛挪亚说：“请你留下来，我们要预备一只山羊羔给你吃。”
